2605.00356.title: MemRouter: Memory-as-Embedding Routing for Long-Term Conversational Agents
2605.00356.paper_summary: Long-term conversational agents must decide which turns to store in external memory, yet recent systems rely on autoregressive LLM generation at every turn to make that decision. We present MemRouter, a write-side memory router that decouples memory admission from the downstream answer backbone and replaces per-turn memory-management decoding with an embedding-based routing policy. MemRouter encodes each turn together with recent context, projects the resulting embeddings through a frozen LLM backbone, and predicts whether the turn should be stored using lightweight classification heads while training only 12M parameters. Under a controlled matched-harness comparison on LoCoMo, where the retrieval pipeline, answer prompts, and QA backbone (Qwen2.5-7B) are held identical, MemRouter outperforms an LLM-based memory manager on every question category (overall F1 52.0 vs 45.6, non-overlapping 95% CIs) while reducing memory-management p50 latency from 970ms to 58ms. Descriptive factorial averaging further shows that learned admission improves mean F1 by +10.3 over random storage, category-specific prompting adds +5.2 over a generic prompt, and retrieval contributes +0.7. These results suggest that write-side memory admission can be learned by a small supervised router, while answer generation remains a separate downstream component in long-horizon conversational QA.
2605.00356.paper_summary_zh: 長期對話代理必須決定哪些回合要儲存在外部記憶中，然而最近的系統在每個回合都依賴自回歸LLM生成來做出這個決定。我們提出了MemRouter，一種寫入側記憶路由器，它將記憶接納與下游答案骨幹解耦，並用基於嵌入的路由策略取代每回合的記憶管理解碼。MemRouter將每個回合與最近的上下文一起編碼，通過一個固定的LLM骨幹投影結果嵌入，並使用輕量級分類頭預測該回合是否應該被儲存，同時僅訓練12M參數。在LoCoMo的受控匹配比較中，檢索管道、答案提示和QA骨幹（Qwen2.5-7B）保持一致，MemRouter在每個問題類別上都超越了基於LLM的記憶管理器（整體F1 52.0對45.6，非重疊95% CI），同時將記憶管理的p50延遲從970毫秒減少到58毫秒。描述性因子平均進一步顯示，學習的接納比隨機儲存提高了平均F1 +10.3，特定類別的提示比通用提示增加了+5.2，而檢索貢獻了+0.7。這些結果表明，寫入側記憶接納可以通過一個小型的監督路由器來學習，而答案生成仍然是長期對話QA中的一個獨立下游組件。
2605.00356.author: Tianyu Hu et.al.
2605.00356.authors: Tianyu Hu, Weikai Lin, Weizhi Zhang, Jing Ma, Song Wang
